text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve at tasks by analyzing data instead of following strict instructions. Deep learning goes further by using artificial neural networks to process complex information, such as images or speech. Today, AI is common in daily life: it powers voice assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming services, and helps doctors diagnose diseases. From smart home devices to online shopping, AI helps make life more convenient and efficient.
